title: The future of software engineering, tokenmaxxing and AI in higher education
summary: IBM's Mixture of Experts podcast from New York Tech Week explores how software engineering roles are changing in the AI era, discusses tokenmaxxing as companies exhaust annual AI budgets quickly, and addresses challenges universities face integrating AI literacy into curricula as graduates enter unrecognizable workplaces.
